title: CommunityBoardAppointment
description: A membership appointment to one of Staten Island's three community boards. Under the NYC Charter the borough president appoints (and reappoints) all community board members, half on the nomination of council members. NET-NEW as data: the roster is not published as a dataset — members are recruited via the Community Board Membership Application on statenislandusa.com/cbapplication.html and appointed by the BP. Modeled from the office's charter role.

role.description: Role on the board (District Manager is board staff, not a BP appointee, but listed for completeness).

appointmentType.description: Half of members are appointed on the nomination of the local council member.

nominatingCouncilDistrict.description: Council district of the nominating member (Staten Island: 49-51).
